title: christella boydiae
intro: Christella boydiae, also known as the Indian feather fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Christella boydiae are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Christella boydiae can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by boiling the leaves and stems of the plant in water.
